dashboard.title: Waliwo ekikolobero kizze
dashboard.description: Ekifundikwa kino tekisobodde kutikka. Gerezako okwongera okuddawo ku lupapula oba okukirira obuyambi oba ekizibu kyeeyongera.

route.title: Waliwo ekikolobero kizze
route.versionDesc: Katundu omupya ayinza okuba nga ateekebwa. Tusiime okuddawo ku lupapula okweyongerayo.
route.reloadDesc: Olupapula luno telusobodde kutikka. Tusiime okuddawo ku lupapula oba okugezaako oluvannyuma.

auth.signInSubtitle: Yingira mu kisaawe kyo eky'okudukanya katale
auth.invalidCredentials: Ennamba y'essimu oba ekisumu si kituufu.
auth.accountLocked: Akaawunti y'akomereddwa. Gerezako oluvannyuma lwa {minutes} miniti.

landing.heroSubtitle: MMS ekwata ku kugaba ebifo, okutrackeri ensasula, n'okutereeza okusaba â€” osobole okufa ku kukola katale okugenda mu maaso.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Yakolebwa bakodusi, bakulira, n'abakola mu gavumenti â€” MMS eleeta obwenvunuzi n'obukugu mu mirimo gya katale.
landing.processSubtitle: Funa katale wo okubeera mu nkola y'edijitaalo mu ddakiika, so si myezi
landing.freePlanDesc: Kirungi ennyo ku matale matono agatandika
landing.ctaTitle: Oyetegefu okukyusa enkola ya katale wo?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Jjwangako n'abakozesa 10,000+ abamala nga bakozesa MMS
landing.heroSub: MMS is for stall allocation, track payments, and streamline complaints â€” so you can focus on running a thriving market.
landing.featuresHeading: Everything you need to run your market
landing.featuresSub: Built for vendors, managers, and officials â€” MMS brings transparency and efficiency to market operations.
landing.featureStallsDesc: AI-powered stall assignment based on vendor type, sales history, and market density.
landing.featureBillingDesc: Track dues, utilities, penalties, and send automated receipts with payment reconciliation.
landing.featureComplaintsDesc: End-to-end complaint tracking from report to resolution with SLA monitoring.
landing.featureAnalyticsDesc: Market occupancy, revenue trends, and compliance dashboards for officials.
landing.processSub: Get your market digitized in minutes, not months
landing.step1Desc: OTP verification and digital profile creation
landing.step3Desc: Configure dues, utilities, and payment schedules
landing.reviewsSub: Join thousands of satisfied users across Uganda
landing.testimonial1: MMS made paying my stall dues so easy. No more queues!
landing.testimonial2: The analytics dashboard helps me track occupancy in real-time.
landing.testimonial3: Audit trails and compliance reporting are game-changing.
landing.pricingSub: Start free, scale as you grow
landing.faqSub: Everything you need to know about MMS
landing.faq1A: Vendors register via OTP SMS verification and create their digital profile.
landing.faq2A: Yes, MMS is built to meet KCCA market management standards.
landing.faq3A: Mobile money, bank transfers, and cash collections with digital receipts.
landing.faq4A: Yes, cloud-based dashboard accessible from anywhere.
landing.ctaHeading: Ready to transform your market operations?
landing.ctaSub: Join 10,000+ users already managing their markets with MMS

register.title: Okwewandisa Katundu
register.description: Kola katundu profile, tuma ebikakaso bya dokumenti, era kakasa nti simu yo y'eriko mu mbuga emu.
register.sectionAccountDesc: Kola akaawunti y'omukodusi, yisa abakozesa, era ogabire katale asaanidde nga tonakola okweyanjulira kwa dokumenti.
register.districtHint: Bizijjirawo okuva mu katale - oyinza okubikyusa
register.sectionDocumentsDesc: Situla National ID n'Ebbaluwa y'omukulembeze w'ekitundu okukakasibwa omukulira. Fayiro zibe PDF, JPG, JPEG, oba PNG.
register.profilePhotoDesc: Kikozesebwa mu kitebe ky'abakodusi oluvannyuma lw'okukkirizibwa.
register.validationPhoneValid: Yingira ennamba y'essimu ennuunfu (e.g. +256 7XX XXX XXX).
register.validationPasswordLength: Ekisumu kirina obuteesa obutakka wansi wa nnyukuta 8.
register.phoneInvalid: Yingira ennamba y'essimu ennuunfu (e.g. +256 7XX XXX XXX).
register.passwordMinLength: Ekisumu kirina obuteesa obutakka wansi wa nnyukuta 8.
register.heroDesc: Kola katundu profile, tuma ebikakaso bya dokumenti, era kakasa nti simu yo y'eriko mu mbuga emu.

register.autoFilledDistrict: Bijjirawo okuva mu katale - oyinza okubikyusa

dashboard.monthEndDesc: Sasula ebbanja nga tonaba kuggwawo olunaku olw'okukola okw'omwezi okw'amangu.

dashboard.noPendingApprovals: Tewali kusaba kulindirira. Okusaba okupya kw'abakodusi n'ebifo kulijja wano okukeberebwa.

vendors.activityEmpty: Tewali bikolwa byakolebwa ku mukodusi ono.
vendors.reviewSheetDesc: Kebera ebikwatagana n'oyo ayegayega n'edokumenti ze nga tonasalawo.
vendors.passwordResetDesc: Tuma omukodusi ekisumu ekya kiseera okuyita mu SMS. Ensonga yetaaga.

dashboard.errorDesc: Waliwo obuzibu mu okutikka data y'okulabirira. Weevune oddemu olupapula.

dashboard.subtitle: Enfuna, okukakasiza, okubeerawo, okwemulugunya, n'okuddirira waggulu mu matale agawereddwa.
dashboard.noMarketData: Tewali data y'akatale. Olubereberye lujja kulabika amatale bwe gamala okuteekebwa.

markets.title: Okulondoola katale

markets.performanceDesc: Bitongole n'obuzibu bw'okukakasiza abakola bokeberera amatale agali mu buzibu.

vendors.title: Olukalala lw'abakodusi
vendors.subtitle: Ekitabo ky'abakodusi eky'okusoma kwokka okunoonya, okutongoosa, n'okufulumya. Abakola basobola okukebera ebyawandiikibwa nga tebakkiriza oba tebakyusa.

compliance.title: Okutegeeza okukakasiza
compliance.subtitle: Ebipimo by'okukakasiza ebikolebwa ebikwata ku SLA y'okusaba, obuyonjo, ebbanja ebiyise, okukola, n'ebyetaago ebitakolebwa.
compliance.scorecardDesc: Ekipimo kikwata ku kukakasibwa kw'abakodusi, okuggwa kw'ensasula, okutereezebwa kw'okusaba, okubeerawo, n'okukola.

analytics.title: Okupima okw'enfuna
analytics.subtitle: Enfuna, enkola y'okusasula, okusaasaana kw'abakodusi, n'embeera y'amatale okusobola okusalawo.
analytics.monthlyCollectionsDesc: Ensasula eziggiddwa eziteereddwa mu buli mwezi.
analytics.revenueByMarketDesc: Amatale agalina enfuna esinga mu kitundu kino.
analytics.vendorDistributionDesc: Ebifu by'omugula ebisinga obungi mu kitabo.

payments.receiptRequiredDesc: Yongereza lasiiti ya banka nga tonatuma.
payments.receiptSubmittedDesc: Lasiiti yo ya banka erindirira okukkirizibwa omukulira.

profile.title: Credential ya Muntu
profile.description: Obwenkanya bw'omuntu, endaga y'okukwatagana, ekifaananyi ky'obwenkanya, n'ebikwatagana n'akatale.
profile.errorDesc: Tetwasobola okutuuka ku byawandiikibwa bya profayili. Keera okwetegereze obukwate bwo.
profile.profileInfoDesc: Entegeka nga ekisumu, okumanyisibwa, ebisale, ebyagalibwa, n'ebikolwa bikolebwa ku lupapula lwa Entegeka.
profile.profilePhotoDesc: Kirabikira mu kitebe ky'okukolera, ku lupyo lwa profayili, n'ebifo eby'okukebera abaakozi.
profile.uploadPhotoDesc: JPEG, PNG, oba WebP okutuuka ku 5 MB.
profile.contactInfoDesc: Ebikwatagana ku profayili ebikozesebwa okukakasa, okumanyisa, n'okugoberera abaakozi.
profile.scopeDesc: Okugabibwa kw'akatale n'ebikwatagana ku profayili eri etteeka.
profile.verificationStatusDesc: Olukalala lw'okukakasa obwenkanya n'endaga ezikozesebwa okukkiriza omukodusi.
